summary: Excellent audience recording captures a solid mid‑'94 Dead show highlighted by China Cat > Rider, Jack Straw and an emotional Stella Blue.
review: The tape is widely praised as the best audience recording of 1994 on the archive, delivering clear and sweet sound that lets the band’s consistent performance shine. Highlights include a ripping Jack Straw, a superb China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider segue, and an especially moving Stella Blue, while a minor lyric slip in Deal is the only noticeable blemish.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance with many standout songs and an excellent audience recording; few minor issues keep it just shy of perfection.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best 1994 audience tape on the site – crisp, sweet and very listenable with no major drop‑outs or noise issues.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set opens strong with China Cat > Rider and maintains momentum through emotional moments like Stella Blue, ending on a sing‑along Box of Rain; overall the show feels solid and consistently tight.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar work is praised as “working tonight” with moving moments on Stella Blue, though he forgets the Deal lyrics.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned a brand‑new Phil tune in the set (specific title not named).
band_member_comments.Keys: Vince (keyboards) plays well overall, though one reviewer notes he isn’t as “on” as he could be.
band_member_comments.Drums: Strong drums → space segment highlighted; overall drumming praised.
